user.title: Connect to Fellow cloud
user.description: Sign in to discover Fellow Espresso Series 1 machines. Your password is exchanged for tokens and is not stored.

device.title: Choose a Series 1
device.description: Choose the machine to add. Run setup again to add another machine.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to Fellow cloud
reauth_confirm.description: Enter the password for the existing account. The account email cannot be changed during reauthentication.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Fellow cloud
error.no_devices: No Fellow Espresso Series 1 machines were found

abort.no_devices: No Fellow Espresso Series 1 machines were found
